title: What Happens If You Sign Your Closing Documents Wrong in North Carolina?
excerpt: Signing your closing documents wrong in NC can delay your funding, void your loan, or trigger a re-signing. Here's what mistakes actually happen, which ones are fixable, and how to avoid them entirely.
seoTitle: What Happens If You Sign Closing Documents Wrong in NC? | Integrity Closings CLT
seoDescription: Signing closing documents incorrectly in North Carolina can delay your funding or void your loan. Find out what mistakes happen, which are fixable, and how a professional signing agent protects you.
